2026-04-21JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of AppealAppointment of François Joyal of the City of Montréal, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal
precis: Appointment of François Joyal of the City of Montréal, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal.
